---
title: "BayGIS"
description: "Spatial data analysis and geoprocessing workflows for environmental monitoring in Bavaria."
image: thumbnail.jpg
categories: [GIS, R, Geospatial]
---

## About

A collection of GIS-based analysis workflows for regional environmental monitoring. Combines spatial data processing, map production, and reproducible reporting for land use and ecosystem assessments.

## Stack

[R]{.badge-skill} [QGIS]{.badge-skill} [PostGIS]{.badge-skill} [Geospatial]{.badge-skill}
